common.cooldown_desc:
> The {command} is still in cooldown.

> Please wait **{seconds} second(s)** before using the command again.
common.disabled_desc:
> The command {command} is currently disabled.

> You can activate and configure this command in the Leyno Dashboard.
> As soon as it is switched on there, it will be available to you again.
common.nochannel_desc:
> The command {command} is disabled in this channel or with your current permissions.

> You can configure the allowed channels and permissions in the Leyno dashboard.
> After the adjustment, the command can be used again here.
common.blockedrole_desc:
> The {command} is disabled for your role.

> You can set which roles are allowed to use the command in the Leyno dashboard.
> Activate the corresponding role there to be able to use the command.

general.no_permission: You don't have permission to use this command.

settings.language_changed: The language has been changed successfully.

help.title: ❓ | Help
help.description:
> In the Leyno dashboard you have the opportunity to flexibly set and manage various modules.

> Available modules include:
• Ticket – support and inquiry system
• Verify – verification of new users
• Welcome – Welcome messages
• Further modules for server optimization

> Each module can be individually activated, deactivated and adjusted to adapt the server exactly to your needs.

ban.no_perms_desc: > You need the **Ban Members** permission to use this command.
ban.cannot_owner: You cannot ban the server owner.
ban.cannot_higher_role: You cannot ban a member with a higher or equal role.
ban.failed: The ban could not be executed: {error}

clear.no_perm_desc: > You need the **Manage Messages** permission to use `/clear`.
clear.invalid_amount_desc: > Please enter a number between **2** and **100**.
clear.no_messages_desc:
> No deletable messages found.
> Messages older than **2 weeks** cannot be bulk-deleted by Discord.
clear.error_desc:
> Something went wrong while deleting the messages.
> Please try again later.

kick.no_perms_desc: > You need the **Kick Members** permission to use this command.
kick.not_on_server: This user is not on this server.
kick.cannot_owner: You cannot kick the server owner.
kick.cannot_higher_role: You cannot kick a member with a higher or equal role.
kick.failed: The kick could not be executed: {error}

userinfo.title: 👤 | User Info – {username}
userinfo.timed_out: ✅ | User **{username}** has been timed out for **{duration} day(s)** successfully.
userinfo.cannot_kick_owner: You cannot kick the server owner.
userinfo.cannot_ban_owner: You cannot ban the server owner.
userinfo.cannot_timeout_owner: You cannot timeout the server owner.

ticket.system_disabled_desc: The ticket system is currently disabled.
ticket.too_many_desc: You already have {count} open ticket(s). Please wait until they are resolved.
ticket.option_not_found_desc: This ticket option no longer exists. Please try again.
ticket.creation_failed_desc: Could not create the ticket channel: {error}
ticket.db_error_desc: An internal database error occurred. Please try again later.
ticket.not_found_db_desc: This ticket could not be found in the database.
ticket.no_perm_close_desc: Only staff members can close tickets.
ticket.no_perm_claim_desc: Only staff members can claim tickets.
ticket.preform_embed_desc: Please choose the option that best matches your issue for **{category}**.
ticket.form_info_desc: Answers submitted by the user before the ticket was opened.
ticket.closure_pending_desc: A close request is already pending.
ticket.closure_not_authorized_desc: You are not authorized to request closure of this ticket.
ticket.closure_approved_desc: Both parties agreed. The ticket will be closed.
ticket.not_in_ticket_desc: You are not a participant in this ticket.
ticket.feedback_only_creator_desc: Only the ticket creator can submit feedback.
ticket.feedback_already_submitted_desc: You have already submitted feedback for this ticket.
ticket.closure_request_desc: Both the ticket owner and a staff member must agree to close this ticket.
ticket.embed_welcome_desc:
Welcome {mention}!
A team member will be with you shortly.

Please describe your issue.
ticket.embed_close_desc:
This ticket has been closed.
Use **Reopen** if you need further assistance.
ticket.embed_reopen_desc: This ticket has been reopened. A team member will respond shortly.
ticket.embed_delete_desc: This channel will be deleted in **5 seconds**.
ticket.embed_feedback_desc: Please rate your experience using the buttons below.
ticket.log_open_desc: A new ticket was opened by {mention}.
ticket.default_welcome_desc:
Welcome {mention}!
A team member will be with you shortly.

Please describe your issue.
ticket.default_close_desc:
This ticket has been closed.
Use **Reopen** if you need further assistance.
ticket.default_reopen_desc: This ticket has been reopened. A team member will respond shortly.
ticket.default_delete_desc: This channel will be deleted in **5 seconds**.
ticket.default_closure_request_desc: {mention} has requested this ticket to be closed.
ticket.default_feedback_desc: Please rate your experience using the buttons below.
ticket.default_form_data_desc: Answers submitted by the user before the ticket was opened.
ticket.default_prompt_desc: Select a category from the dropdown below.
ticket.default_log_open_desc: A new ticket was opened by {mention}.

verify.not_configured: ❌ Verification is not configured on this server.
verify.button_not_for_you: ❌ This button is not for you!
verify.no_challenge_found: ❌ No active challenge found. Please click the button again.
verify.no_role_configured: ❌ No verify role configured. Contact an admin.
verify.role_not_found: ❌ Verify role not found. Contact an admin.
verify.attempts_remaining: You have **{count}** attempt(s) left. Click the button again to retry.
verify.modal_captcha_placeholder: Type the code exactly as shown
verify.prompt_desc_timed:
Hello {mention}!
To access **{server}** verify yourself.
Time: **{timeleft}**
verify.prompt_desc_simple:
Hello {mention}!
Click the button below to access **{server}**.
verify.result_failed_desc: Your answer was incorrect, {mention}. Contact a moderator.
verify.result_timeout_desc: Your verification timed out, {mention}. Contact a moderator.
verify.default_success_desc:
Welcome {user}! 🎉
You have been successfully verified.
Enjoy your stay on {server}!
verify.default_timeout_desc: Hey {mention}, your verification time has expired.

welcome.default_description:
Hey {mention}, welcome to {server}!
You are our {count}th member 🎉

leave.default_description:
**{user}** has left **{server}**.
We now have {count} members.
